胡蝶、田浩二人，本是平凡夫妻，意外获得空间，开始在末日中的求生之旅。
刮地皮，屯物资，炸平樱花山，随心所欲快意末世。
道德绑架？你先卖我点道德！
人不犯我我不犯人？你们先求我少做点恶吧！
不一样的零元购，不一样的囤积物资，不一样的末世走向，真恶人的末世之旅，希望大家喜欢。
（写实派末世，比较慢热，希望大家多多关照）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/p2oef0655d66805d34f825235d80380cc2d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"胡家恶犬","author_id":"","book_id":"7423704071770491966","book_name":"末日天灾：再现","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7423711632859071038","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"163702"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"74","tags":"科幻末世,空间,末世,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/p2oef0655d66805d34f825235d80380cc2d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779333689&x-signature=R5dAxgu8JJb%2F5OQ5WymHr5lmhyc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2694236678667943","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"87"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221121291416F11E8A17FAADF315"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":37935,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39240,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":48},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1731146421,"author_reply_time":1730021402,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_d
